overall.description: A first-person walk through a neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The player character walks through a wet plaza with palm trees, crosses a street with moderate traffic, walks along a multi-lane road with orange barricades, and approaches a street vendor stall. The scene features heavy Japanese-inspired neon signage, wet reflective pavement, and towering skyscrapers typical of Night City from Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with seating and palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the wet plaza toward the illuminated hotel building ahead

entered.detail: skyscraper with large vertical digital billboard displaying advertisements
multi-story building with prominent purple neon HOTEL signage and Japanese characters
tropical palm trees in large planters along the plaza walkway
concrete seating benches arranged along the right side of the plaza
tall street light illuminating the wet pavement with warm light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide urban plaza at night with wet reflective pavement. The camera walks forward toward a distant hotel building with bright neon signage, passing palm trees and empty benches on the right. A tall skyscraper with a digital billboard dominates the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with hotel and pawn shop

events.description: crossing the street alongside other pedestrians while vehicles wait at the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and continuing along the sidewalk past the hotel building and pawn shop

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving past the crosswalk on the street

entered.detail: illuminated signage reading PAWNSHOP on the lower level of the hotel building
white painted stripes on the asphalt indicating pedestrian crossing area

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the open plaza to a street intersection. The hotel building now dominates the left side with its neon signage, while a pawn shop is visible on the ground floor. The camera crosses the street with moderate pedestrian traffic as cars drive past, and the palm trees of the plaza recede behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban street with traffic barriers and neon storefronts

events.description: slight turn to follow the sidewalk curve alongside the orange traffic barriers

agents.ego_description: walking along the street sidewalk next to orange traffic barriers with moderate vehicle traffic passing by

entered.detail: long orange metal railings separating the sidewalk from the multi-lane street
elevated highway or monorail track structure spanning across the street ahead
tall building with vertical red neon signage running up its facade

segments.scene_description: Walking along a multi-lane urban street with orange traffic barriers on the right. Vehicles pass by on the left while towering buildings with neon signs line both sides. An elevated skyway structure is visible in the distance, and the hotel building recedes into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: street vendor stall with neon open sign and merchandise display

events.description: approaching the illuminated vendor stall with visible merchandise boxes and fluorescent lighting

agents.ego_description: approaching and stopping at a street vendor stall selling various items under fluorescent lights

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind the merchandise table attending the stall

entered.detail: street vendor cart with canopy displaying boxes of merchandise and items for sale
green circular neon sign with OPEN text indicating the stall is operating
cardboard boxes and displays containing various goods on the vendor table
bright overhead fluorescent tube lighting illuminating the vendor area

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a street vendor stall tucked under a building overhang. The camera turns toward the stall, passing the orange barricades, and stops at the merchandise display illuminated by fluorescent lights and a green neon OPEN sign. A vendor stands behind the table as the street traffic and elevated skyway disappear from view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide, reflective urban plaza into the intimate glow of a roadside vendor stall. It begins by moving across wet pavement toward a distant hotel and towering digital billboards, passing palm trees and empty benches under the night sky. As the camera reaches a street intersection, the open plaza recedes and the hotel shifts to the left, where the camera weaves through pedestrian traffic and passing cars. The scene then transitions onto a multi-lane road lined with orange traffic barriers and towering neon signs, moving past flowing vehicles toward a distant elevated skyway. Finally, the camera turns away from the main thoroughfare to approach a vendor stall tucked under a building overhang, coming to a stop before a merchandise display illuminated by fluorescent lights and a green neon open sign.
